---
title: "e_cigarette_data"
author: "Elizabeth Greenan"
date: "2026-03-28"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

Code written by Elizabeth and tested by Elizabeth and Nick

Due to a SAS import limitation in Python, R is being utilized to import the
2024 BRFSS dataset. The following code uses the haven library to read the
data, which is in XPT format.

```{r}

library(haven)

e_cig_data <- read_xpt("data/LLCP2024.XPT")

head(e_cig_data)

```

The next line of code writes this as a CSV file, so it can be read into Python
for analysis. row.names = FALSE was included so an index column is not written
to the CSV file.

```{r}

write.csv(e_cig_data, "data/LLCP2024.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
